raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing this complaint because I have been the victim of fraud on my XXXX Citibank account involving a {$12000.00} XXXX XXXX XXXX no-show scam. I have provided Citibank with complete supporting documentation, including proof of the fraudulent transactions, on the following dates : Sunday, XX/XX/year>, at XXXXXXXX XXXX Tuesday, XX/XX/year>, at XXXXXXXX XXXX Wednesday, XX/XX/year>, at XXXXXXXX XXXX Tuesday, XX/XX/year>, at XXXXXXXX XXXX  ( resent email originally sent on XX/XX/year> ) On Tuesday, XX/XX/year>, at XXXXXXXX XXXX, I also sent a good faith letter to Citibanks executive team outlining my extensive documentation efforts and attempts to resolve this matter directly. 

Despite these repeated efforts, the issue remains unresolved, and Citibank has not provided a meaningful response or reimbursement. I have attached all records of correspondence and documentation previously sent to Citibanks dispute department for your review. 

I respectfully request that the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau review this case to ensure that Citibank complies with its obligations under the Fair Credit Billing Act and conducts a thorough and proper investigation into this fraud.
